## Use case

What are you trying to accomplish? What does your code look like today,
and what would you like it to look like instead?

## Proposed API shape (optional)

If you have a concrete API in mind, sketch it here.

## Alternatives considered

Workarounds you have already tried, or other approaches you have considered.

## Additional context

Links to relevant Workspace ONE UEM API documentation, related issues, etc.
